overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from GTA V showing a character jogging along the Del Perro Beach promenade at sunset. The camera follows the character past palm trees and beachfront properties before turning onto the sandy beach toward the pier and Ferris wheel.

agents.ego_description: following a female jogger along the concrete promenade with the beach and pier visible to the left

notable_agents.action: female character jogging while talking on a phone, wearing black athletic wear

entered.detail: long wooden pier extending into the ocean with a Ferris wheel at the end
large illuminated Ferris wheel structure on the pier
tall palm trees lining the right side of the promenade
ornate black street lamps with multiple globes lining the left side
multi-story beachfront properties with balconies facing the ocean
wide concrete walking path with sand scattered on surface
expansive sandy beach area between the path and ocean

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a beachfront promenade at sunset with a vivid pink sky. The camera follows a female jogger along a concrete path lined with palm trees and vintage street lamps. The Del Perro Pier with its Ferris wheel is visible in the distance across the sandy beach, while beach houses line the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachfront promenade with modern beach houses

events.description: camera passes the female jogger and continues forward along the promenade

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade past various pedestrians and beachfront properties

notable_agents.action: male pedestrian in yellow shirt walking toward camera holding a white cup

entered.detail: two-story building with orange stucco walls and glass block windows
decorative wall made of glass blocks reflecting the pink sunset

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the jogger and continues along the promenade, passing an orange stucco building with distinctive glass block walls on the right. The palm trees and street lamps now appear on the left side as the camera advances, while the pier remains visible in the distance. Pedestrians walk in the opposing direction along the path.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past modern beach houses and landscaped hedges

entered.detail: contemporary multi-story building with external spiral staircase and glass railings
tall manicured hedge running along the property line

segments.scene_description: The path continues past modern concrete beach houses with glass railings and spiral staircases. Tall green hedges replace the earlier walls on the right side. The camera maintains a steady walking pace along the concrete promenade as the sun continues to set, casting a warm pink glow over the scene.

events.description: camera turns left off the concrete promenade onto the sandy beach toward the pier

agents.ego_description: turning toward the ocean and walking across the sand toward the lifeguard tower and pier

entered.detail: traditional wooden lifeguard tower with American flag on the sand
expansive sandy beach with tire tracks and sparse vegetation

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left off the promenade and onto the open sandy beach, leaving the buildings and palm trees behind. A wooden lifeguard tower stands prominently on the sand as the camera approaches the shoreline. The Del Perro Pier and Ferris wheel are now directly ahead across the expansive beach, with the pink sunset reflecting off the ocean horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal promenade that eventually transitions into an open walk across a sandy beach at sunset. It begins by following a female jogger along a concrete path lined with palm trees and vintage street lamps under a vivid pink sky, with the distant Del Perro Pier and Ferris wheel visible ahead. As the camera advances past the jogger, the scenery shifts from orange stucco buildings with glass block walls to modern beach houses featuring glass railings and tall green hedges. The scene then maintains a steady pace along the promenade before turning left off the pavement and onto the open sand. Finally, the camera leaves the buildings behind to pass a wooden lifeguard tower, heading directly toward the pier and Ferris wheel as the pink sunset reflects off the ocean horizon.
